meta.project: Learning Management System (LMS) for Schools & Colleges

product_overview: A role-based learning management system for schools and colleges that supports login, separate admin/teacher/student dashboards, and core academic tracking. Users can access courses, assignments, and grades according to their role.
core_goals: Allow users to sign in and access the correct role-based dashboard
Let admins manage users and courses from an institutional view
Let students view enrolled courses, assignments, and grades
Let teachers manage course-related grading and class records

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Role-based login entry point that lets a user select their role and access the corresponding dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select a role -> Enter login credentials -> Submit the form -> See the matching role dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Select a role -> Enter incomplete credentials -> Submit the form -> See validation feedback and remain on the login page

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin workspace for overseeing institutional users and courses.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select the admin role -> Enter login credentials -> Submit the form -> See the admin dashboard
Navigate to /admin -> Open the users area -> Review user accounts -> Manage a user account
Navigate to /admin -> Open the courses area -> Review course records -> Manage a course

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Student workspace for viewing enrolled courses, assignments, and grades.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select the student role -> Enter login credentials -> Submit the form -> See the student dashboard
Navigate to /student -> Open the courses area -> View enrolled course information -> Open course content
Navigate to /student -> Open the assignments area -> View assignment details -> Review grades and feedback
Navigate to /student -> Open course information -> Attempt to access content not available in the current enrollment -> See access restricted for unavailable course content

features.name: Teacher Dashboard
features.description: Teacher workspace for managing class records and grades for assigned teaching responsibilities.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Select the teacher role -> Enter login credentials -> Submit the form -> See the teacher dashboard
Navigate to /teacher -> Review assigned classes -> Open the gradebook area -> View student grade records
Navigate to /teacher -> Open the gradebook area -> Enter a grade for a student -> Save the update -> See the updated record reflected in the gradebook

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Admin view for managing users and courses

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Student view for courses, assignments, and grades

features.name: Teacher Dashboard
features.description: Teacher view for managing classes and grades
